channel.title: +MT on Vishvas's English lit
channel.description: Recent content in +MT on Vishvas's English lit

item.title: The new farce of baNabhatta
item.description: Source: here. bANa had just written a new play and was showing it to rAja harSha. harSha said he was impressed and decided that it must be put upon stage without any further delay. harSha called in his entertainers and asked them to make the arrangements. After a while, the entertainers reported to the mahArAjAdiraja parama-bhaTTAraka of sthAneshwara stating that they were hard-pressed to find a suitable vidUShaka for the play.

item.title: The mother of all battles
item.description: Source: here. The ruffians of Southern Saxony had always held the Indian armies in contempt. In one of the greatest battles of all times the princes of the Andhra and the Karnata country had destroyed the Saxon pride that had swelled in the great invasion of India in the year of 2001 under Emperor of all Saxony, Slit-Eyes+++(=nAsser Hussain?)+++. In the battle of Chennai the prince of Mumbai had put to sword the Southern Saxon army.

item.title: Charlotte’s tale
item.description: Source: here. Charlotte narrated me a strange incidence as we were recuperating from a session in the wild observing local fungal genera. Normally I do not suffer such tales lightly, but on this occasion I found some strange connection with certain imprints from my own past, and accordingly listened to her in rapt attention. At that time Charlotte had just arrived from her native land and preceded me by an year to the big city where I was to later live.
